nodes.name: Locale UI Patterns Skill
nodes.description: Internationalization patterns for OpenChamber UI text requiring all user-facing strings to go through @/lib/i18n

nodes.name: i18n System
nodes.description: packages/ui/src/lib/i18n/ with useI18n() hook, message dictionaries per locale, and label() for locale name display

nodes.name: i18n Key Style Convention
nodes.description: Stable semantic keys with namespace.location.role pattern (e.g. settings.appearance.language.label), never English text as keys

nodes.name: Complete Message Keys Rule
nodes.description: Plural/count-dependent and optional-clause text must use separate complete-message keys, never grammar fragments as params or sentence injection

nodes.name: i18n Non-Translated Terms
nodes.description: Product names (OpenChamber, OpenCode, GitHub), protocol acronyms (MCP, SSE, WebSocket, API), model/provider names, file paths and user content are not translated
